customer_segments.description: ABC1 adults aged 35–65, rural or semi-rural access, mobile-first behaviour, food provenance values. Browses map without login for impulse discovery and pre-trip planning.
customer_segments.size_indicator: 22.3 million UK adults who value local food (FSA Food and You 2, Wave 7, 2024); approximately 14.3 million across UK+Ireland

customer_segments.description: Urban or peri-urban adults 18–35, digital-native, seeks local food sources. Future online ordering customer for V3.
customer_segments.size_indicator: FARMA: farmers' market footfall grew 12% in 2023, driven by 18–35 attendance

customer_segments.description: Owner-operator aged 50–70, low digital sophistication, sceptical of directories. Primary Bronze conversion target once traffic evidence available.
customer_segments.size_indicator: 2,310 UK farm shops with no web presence (FRA Digital Adoption Survey 2022)

customer_segments.description: Digitally engaged owner aged 30–45, already on Shopify/Instagram, seeking new customer acquisition. Early Bronze and Silver adopter.
customer_segments.size_indicator: Approximately 1,020 UK farm shops with existing web presence; subset (~400) with e-commerce capability

customer_segments.description: Cooperative manager claiming multiple listings under one organisational identity. Future enterprise tier signal.
customer_segments.size_indicator: B2B signal; not primary V1 segment

value_propositions.proposition: Browse every farm shop and honesty box across the UK and Ireland on a single map — no login, no fee — and discover local food you did not know existed within driving distance.
Permanent free listing on the map — no trial period, no credit card, no fee expiry. Be discoverable to consumers passing your area even if you have no website.
A fully branded shop presence — logo, photos, product catalogue, enquiry form, performance dashboard, verified badge — for £20/month. Demonstrably cheaper than Yell; more attributable than Facebook.
A complete online marketplace for £60/month plus 3% commission. No Shopify setup, no Google Ads spend; the Farmmap consumer audience is included.
Silver plus a done-for-you marketing service (newsletter feature, weekly social posts, homepage placement, quarterly blog post) for £100/month plus 5% commission.

channels.description: farmmap.co.uk exact-match domain + 953 indexed listing pages + county landing pages + editorial content programme targeting 'farm shop near me' and related queries. Primary consumer acquisition channel.
Data-sharing or endorsement arrangement with the Farm Retail Association providing introduction to 1,200 member businesses. Estimated 3× conversion uplift vs cold outreach.
Automated email to unclaimed listing owner once listing reaches threshold traffic (100+ monthly sessions). Shows traffic evidence before asking for Bronze upgrade. CAC approximately £85.
In-person outreach for high-priority Bronze targets (farm shows, targeted county visits). 20–30% conversion; CAC approximately £190.
Co-branded honesty box listings in Ireland and Northern Ireland via data-sharing arrangement. Provides Irish market credibility without independent consumer acquisition.
Farm shop owners sharing their Farmmap listing pages; social sharing by consumers discovering honesty boxes.

customer_relationships.description: No login required for map browsing. Optional account creation for reviews and order history. Relationship is with the product, not with a human.
Onboarding is self-serve. Support via email for dashboard questions. Analytics dashboard is the primary ongoing relationship touchpoint.
Stripe Connect onboarding requires more guidance. Gold tier includes managed marketing service (newsletter, social). Ongoing account management relationship.
Formal data-sharing or co-marketing agreement. Founder-level relationship.

revenue_streams.note: Primary revenue stream at V2 launch; low CAC ceiling requires traffic evidence to convert
Attractive once Farmmap drives ≥£1,500/month GMV per shop
Commission cap above £8,000/month GMV to be designed before V3 launch
Done-for-you output; requires content team delivery capacity

key_resources: farmmap.co.uk exact-match domain (durable SEO asset; unacquirable by competitors)
953 verified seed listings (map density at launch; no cold-start)
yourhonestybox.com consent partnership (336 Irish/NI listings; community credibility)
Next.js + Supabase/PostGIS + Stripe Connect Standard technology stack (fully specified)
Multi-tenant directory engine (low incremental cost per additional vertical: £15,000–25,000)
FRA data relationship (target — not yet secured; highest-leverage pre-launch asset)
Founder technical capability (spec, architecture, build oversight)
key_activities: Build and launch V1 free directory (8-sprint plan; 80 tasks)
SEO content programme (county guides, long-tail landing pages, schema.org markup)
Farm shop owner acquisition programme (FRA partnership, traffic-triggered email, rep visits)
Listing moderation and quality assurance (photo review, claim verification, data quality)
Bronze tier conversion (analytics dashboard evidence → upgrade conversation)
V3 marketplace build (Silver/Gold ordering, Stripe Connect onboarding, allergen compliance)
Portfolio engine launch (second vertical after 100 Bronze subscribers confirmed)

key_partners.type: Data partner (consent confirmed; formal agreement recommended)
key_partners.value_exchange: Farmmap gets 336 Irish/NI listings + community credibility; yourhonestybox.com gets commercial model and UK reach
FRA members get better digital product; Farmmap gets 1,200-member warm referral channel and listing data
Stripe processes subscriptions and marketplace payments; Farmmap avoids FCA payment institution registration
Managed PostgreSQL + PostGIS + Auth at low cost; Supabase gets a case study directory business
Next.js-optimised global edge hosting; Farmmap gets SSR + CDN at low variable cost
Open map data + open-source rendering; Farmmap avoids Google Maps API variable cost exposure

cost_structure.estimate: £0 (Supabase free tier at launch) → £70/month at scale
1.5% + 20p on subscriptions; 0.25% Stripe Connect application fee on marketplace GMV
Solo at launch; estimated 30–40 hrs/week across all functions

cost_structure.cost: Legal (privacy policy, EU GDPR rep, ToS, allergen opinion)

untested_assumptions: 6% free-to-Bronze conversion rate of claimed listings (high-risk assumption; most sensitive variable in the model)
30% Bronze-to-Silver progression after 6+ months (directional; no comparable data from UK farm shop directories)
Silver average GMV of £800–£1,800/month per shop (unvalidated; comparable Shopify farm shop data unavailable)
100,000 monthly consumer visitors within 12 months of V1 (dependent on SEO content programme execution)
FRA partnership secured before or at V1 launch (critical for Bronze conversion; not yet confirmed)
Farm shop owner digital fatigue can be overcome with traffic evidence (correct framing, but field validation needed)
